title: Hardcore Revive Reloaded
description: Implements a three life system that creates a more multiplayer-friendly hardcore mechanic. Discontinued -- Use the new Hardcore Revive+ instead.
body:
## Hardcore Revive Reloaded has been discontinued and will no longer receive updates. Please use [Hardcore Revive+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hardcore-revive-plus) instead.

## Overview
**Do not activate Hardcore mode with this pack enabled! It will not work!**

This is a continuation of the [Hardcore Revive+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hardcore-revive-plus) project that aims to reduce the challenge of hardcore multiplayer by giving each player three lives. 

Once a player loses all three of their lives, they become a **ghost**. Ghosts can be revived when another player throws a **Soul Charm** at them. Until then, your ghost is able to move freely around the world in spectator mode.

<details>
<summary>Soul Charm Recipe</summary>
    
  ![Soul Charm Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a35eab05eb6d3511d2355d980c573bac2e9ff67.png)
</details>


Players can also regain their lost lives by crafting **Life Jam**. Drinking this item restores one life to the player, with a maximum of 4 lives. Players with 4 lives receive two extra hearts, totaling to 12.

<details>
<summary>Life Jam Recipe</summary>

  ![Life Jam Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba017a83ec071c5362439b267b5f184d853679d7.png)

</details>

As of Version 1.5, there are two craftable potions, called **Bedrock Essence** and **Axolotl's Blessing**. Bedrock Essence grants the player Resistance I until death, while Axolotl's Blessing grants Regeneration I until death. These effects cannot be used at the same time.


<details>
<summary>Bedrock Essence Recipe</summary>

![Bedrock Essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee808e45369b33bdca2a186eebb61e0e5dc0c6f8.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Axolotl's Blessing Recipe</summary>

![Axolotl's Blessing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b8dc4aa32804564085cc00993c1b6f3e1bae672.png)

</details>

## Configuration
You can configure settings in-game via the command `/function hcrplus:_settings`.


## Features
- You can can revive other players who have lost their 3 lives
- Players can use Life Jam to restore their lost lives
- Ghosts can possess other players or mobs to grant either buffs or debuffs
- Health is reduced after being revived or crafting a Soul Charm
- Adds more challenge to Minecraft multiplayer without being as punishing as Hardcore mode.

## Incompatibilities
- Vanilla Hardcore mode
- [Hardcore Revive+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hardcore-revive-plus)
- Any **"Unlock all recipes"** data pack or mod
